title: Taif, Makkah — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Taif, Makkah: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Taif is a city in Makkah with a population of 688,000. A mountain city in western Saudi Arabia, known for its cooler climate, rose gardens, and as a summer retreat.

Last updated: July 23, 2026
